creator: josh.carroll@gmail.com
text:
Thanks for the link, but unfortunately that patch doesn't apply cleanly
with the current vim port:

No file to patch.  Skipping...
1 out of 1 hunks ignored--saving rejects to files/patch-configure.rej
Can't create files/patch-configure.rej, output is in /tmp//patchrzebql1: No
such file or directory
=> Patch patch-configure failed to apply cleanly.
=> Patch(es) patch-01 applied cleanly.
*** [do-patch] Error code 1

But it sounds like something should be forthcoming from upstream source?

Thanks,
Josh
